pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Create data_manifest.json with at least 10 claim mappings. Implement validate_integration.py skeleton that reads manifest and checks 3 sample claims against source JSON files.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: data_manifest.json created with >= 10 claims mapped. validate_integration.py runs and checks at least 3 claims. Known discrepancies documented.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Draft correction plan: list all sections needing updates, specific old text -> new text replacements. Do not actually modify LaTeX yet.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Correction plan with >= 10 specific text replacements documented. Grep patterns identified for stale data.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Generate fig4_patching_comparison.pdf only (simplest figure). Load patching JSON, plot paired dots for 3 hierarchies. Verify PDF renders.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: fig4_patching_comparison.pdf generated, file size > 10KB, axes labeled correctly.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Import all packages, check GPU, verify iter_009 probe files exist.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All imports succeed, GPU detected with >= 24GB VRAM, probe files found at iter_009 path.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Test probe degradation at ONE level (F1=0.85 only) on first-letter at L24 16k. Inject label noise, verify F1 drops to target, measure absorption rate. Compare with F1=1.0 baseline from iter_009.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Probe degraded to F1=0.85 +/- 0.02. Absorption rate computed. Rate differs from F1=1.0 baseline (27.1%). Direction of effect documented (higher or lower absorption with degraded probe).

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Test decoder direction ablation on 5 first-letter absorption instances at L24 16k. Measure logit change. Compare with city-continent mean (3.98 nats).
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Logit changes computed for 5 instances. Mean |logit change| reported. Random direction control computed. Order-of-magnitude comparison with 3.98 nats.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Compute cos_sim, co_occur, R_parent for 15 pairs pooled from first-letter + city-continent. Compute Spearman rho.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Per-pair predictors computed for >= 15 pairs. Spearman rho and p-value reported. Comparison with iter_009 20-pair result (rho=0.261).

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Load iter_009 negative results JSON. Generate clean summary for GAS and CMI only (2 of 5 appendix sections).
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: GAS and CMI appendix summaries generated with specific metrics and failure analysis.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Document per-unique-word aggregation and token position asymmetry (2 of 5 methodological notes).
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: 2 methodology notes documented with clear explanations.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Aggregate available pilot results. Draft hypothesis verdict table for H1-H10 using combination of pilot data and iter_009 results.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Draft consolidation with all 10 hypothesis verdicts. Writing gate assessment provided.

GO_conditions: Probe degradation achievable (F1 drops to target level with noise injection)
Absorption rate changes with probe quality (non-zero effect detected at pilot level)
F1=1.0 control matches iter_009 baseline within 10 pp
Decoder direction magnitude computable on first-letter (no pipeline errors)
NOGO_conditions: Noise injection does not degrade probe F1 (mechanism broken)
GPU OOM on Gemma 2B + SAE loading
Iter_009 probe files missing or corrupted
CONDITIONAL_GO: Rate-distortion still shows rho < 0.3 (proceed, will report as definitive negative)
Decoder magnitude differs substantially from city-continent (proceed, hierarchy-dependent is informative)
Probe degradation effect is small (proceed with full range to map the curve)
